creator: horikawa@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
amq.8 contains following typos:
	o I think that ".Nm amd Ns \'s" is better than ".Nm amd's".
	  Former is used in another place in amq.8.
	o ".Nmamd" should be ".Nm amd".
	o ".Xr amd.conf 8" should be ".Xr amd.conf 5", because
	  amd.conf manpage is in section 5.

Fix: Apply following patch for src/contrib/amd/amq/amq.8 revision
	1.3 (HEAD).
How-To-Repeat: 
	% man 8 amq
